title: Brisbane, Queensland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Brisbane, Queensland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Brisbane is a city in Queensland with a population of 2,568,927. Queensland’s sunny capital with a laid-back lifestyle, riverfront dining, and gateway to the Gold Coast.
